summary: Created docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md for the unfinished DinoBrain OS improvement plan and ran multi-agent consensus review. Round 1 produced six REVISE_REQUIRED results, all integrated into the document. Round 2 produced six AGREE results and two further REVISE_REQUIRED results from Observatory/product evidence and install/release parity; both were integrated. Final rerun obtained explicit AGREE for roles 1-4, but roles 5-10 could not be completed because repeated subagent attempts returned empty completed=null outputs. Therefore the document is written, but the user's strict 10/10 final consensus condition is not satisfied yet.
decisions: Do not claim final 10/10 consensus while subagent outputs are empty or missing.
Treat P0-04 direct MCP parity, P0-05 native instruction authority, and P0-06 source/chunk/claim lineage as hard gates.
Treat current RAG canaries as scaffolding until semantic provider and generated-answer quality eval are implemented.
Observatory and install/release parity conditions were strengthened after Role 8 and Role 9 objections.
next_steps: Rerun final consensus for roles 5-10 when the subagent tool returns visible final messages.
After 10/10 final AGREE, update the Final Consensus Record section of docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md.
Then implement P0-04, P0-05, P0-06 in order before P1/P2 work.
